## Viral Meme Face Filter - Project Setup

- [x] Verify project creation
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Install Required Dependencies

### Project Overview

Real-time face detection application that overlays viral meme expressions on detected faces using OpenCV.

### Completion Status

✅ **Project Setup Complete**
- Python virtual environment configured
- Dependencies installed: opencv-python, numpy, Pillow
- Core modules created: face_detector.py, meme_overlay.py, main.py
- Placeholder meme system ready
- Application ready to launch
